channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
DeepSeek V4 彻底解决了 Agent 最大的痛点：贵
V4 虽然涨价了，但性价比拉满，特别是 flash，简直不要钱，人人都能用起来了
ColaOS 的内测也终于可以进入下一阶段 这两天...
item.description:
DeepSeek V4 彻底解决了 Agent 最大的痛点：贵
V4 虽然涨价了，但性价比拉满，特别是 flash，简直不要钱，人人都能用起来了
ColaOS 的内测也终于可以进入下一阶段 这两天会把 waitlist 全部放开
--- @oran_ge | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 24
item.author: @oran_ge

item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title: While US politicians/lobbyists are scaremongering about “Chinese distillation,” Chinese scientists a...
item.description:
While US politicians/lobbyists are scaremongering about “Chinese distillation,” Chinese scientists are actually sharing real AI breakthroughs in the open.
These kind of advances have nothing to do with data and benefit everyone, including small (and possibly big) US labs.
--- @amasad | ❤️ 29 | 🔁 5 | 💬 3 | 👁 1114
item.author: @amasad
